description_for_human: Book verified rental cars in Douala and Yaoundé, Cameroon. Pre-arrival booking with transparent pricing.
description_for_model: Karu is a verified car rental marketplace for Cameroon, serving Douala and Yaoundé. It connects travellers with document-verified car rental providers. Supports pre-arrival booking, MTN Mobile Money payments, and in-app chat. Currently in pre-launch with waitlist open at getkaru.io.
